title: Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyan hnuaiah International Day against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking pualin School naupang tan Drawing Competition buatsaih
content:
1142/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 23rdJune, 2026:Vawiin khan Hnahthial Govt High School-ah DC Office leh School Education Department tangkawp chuan Middle school leh High School & Higher Secondary School zirlaite tan Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyan hnuaiah International Day against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking pualin Drawing competition an buatsaih a. Middle school atang hian zirlai 30 telin High School leh Higher Secondary School atang hian zirlai 32 an tel a ni.

Lemziaka inelna hi tlai dar 01:30 atang khan neih tan niin tlai dar 03:00 thleng neih a ni a. 'Say No to Drugs' chu thupuiah hman niin Category hnih, Middle School leh High & Higher Secondary School te tan inelna hi buatsaih a ni.

Lawmman pakhatna hian Pawisa fai Rs. 3000 leh citation dawngin Pahnihna hian Rs. 2000 leh citation a dawng ang a. Pathumna hian Rs. 1000 leh citation dawngin zirlai pahnih hnenah consolation prize, Rs. 500 leh citation hlan an ni bawk ang.

June ni 25 (Thursday) hian Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyan pualin Grand Rally (Ruihhlo Dona Kawngzawh) neih tur niin zing dar 9:15 atangin hmun hnih, Nauhruaikawn leh Electric Veng Volleyball court atangte a kawng hi zawh tan tur a ni dawn a. Bazar shed kawt thleng hi kawng zawh tur niin chuta program hman hunah chuan lawmawm hi sem a ni ang. He hunah hian Legal  Awareness Campaign leh Drugs Abuse Awareness Campaign neih tura ruahmanna siam a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah LMC Board of Councillors an ṭhu khawm
content:
1141/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 23:Vawiin khan Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) Board of Councillors (BoC) chu an Chairman Pu Lalzuithanga kaihhruaiin Lunglei Convention Centre-a BoC Meeting Hall-ah an ṭhu khawm.

He ṭhut khawmah hian LMC sum hman dan kalphung, Revised Standard Operating Procedure (Re-SOP) for Utilisation of Funds under LMC chu ennawn leh niin, siam ṭhat ngai laite siam ṭhat a ni a. LMC huam chhunga lirthei hun man (Vehicle Parking Fee) sum lut hmanna tur rel niin, parking fee sum chu zaa za mipuiah let se tih kalpui mek chu chhunzawm ni se, tih a ni a. Parking fee tling khawm aṭang hian Lunglei khaw chhung lirthei chet vel dan leh mipuite him zel nan Traffic Warden rawih ṭha tih niin, LMC huam chhunga cable hrui hnawkte then fai ni se, tih a ni bawk.

He ṭhut khawmah hian Faina Puitu App nihphung leh faina kawnga hma laknaa hman ṭangkai a nih theih dan tur te thlir ho niin, a khawihtute nena thawh ho dan ngaihtuaha hma lak ni se, tih a ni a. Khawpui chhung bawlhhlawh sawngbawl dan, Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 chungchangah Supreme Court thu chhuak angin a ṭul angte bawhzuia a rang lama tihfel ni se, Lunglei Municipal Council hman theih tur Bye-Laws pawh buaipui ni se, tih a ni a. October ni 31, 2026 ral hmain bawlhhlawh 30% tal chi 4-a thliar hran ni se, tih a ni.

Kawng sira zankhuaa lirthei dah (overnight parking) buaipui chungchangah Lunglei Municipal Council leh Local Council ṭang kawpa thawh dunna thuthlung chu a tawp tawh avangin LMC aṭanga hma lak dan tur sawi ho niin, Lunglei Municipal Council area-a lirthei hunna/dahna (garage) nei lote'n nei vek tura hma lak ni se, tih a ni a. Garage neih kim hun atan September ni 30, 2026 chu bituk a ni.

Sumdawn phalna (Trade License) pek chungchangah a hmun azira pawisa (fee) chawi tur zat thliar hran dan (zone classification & fee) leh Trade License nun hun chhung (validity) chu zir chian a, la rel ṭhat ni se, tih a ni a. Urban Local Body (ULB) Grant hmanga siam Hrangchalkawna Submersible Water Pump chu PHED kuta hlan remtih a ni.

Vawiina LMC Board of Councillors ṭhut khawmah hian Chairman Pu Lalzuithanga, Vice Chairman Pu K. Lalrinawma, Executive Councillor Pu Zorinsanga Hmar leh Pi Lalhruaitluangi Sailo te bakah, elected councillor-te an tel kim a. LMC Chief Executive Officer Pu Lalhmansanga leh Secretary Pu Lalremruata Sailo te'n an telpui bawk.

Attachment

title: Hnahthialah District Level NCORD meeting neih niin Ruihhlo do kawnga hmalak dan tur - 3 Years Action Plan pawh duan fel a nih tawh thu tarlan a ni
content:
1140/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 23rd June, 2026:Vawiin khan Hnahthial DC Meeting Hall-ah Bawrhsap, Pi K. Vanlalruati kaihhruaiin District Level Narco Coordination Centre (NCORD) member-te chu an thutkhawm a. Hnahthial SP, Pu Shivam Siddharth bakah member hrang hrangten report pe in Hnahthiala ruihhlo tawlh tih reh nana hmalak dan tur hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan Hnahthial chu District dang ngaihtuah chuan ruihhlo tawlh ruk a tlem deuh ni a a lan thu sawiin chutih rual chuan tan lak ngaihna tam tak a la awm thu a sawi a. Hnahthial chu border area a nih avangin luhka tam lo mah se ruihhlo tawlh rukna kalkawng pakhat a nih avangin theihtawp chhuah reng a tul thu a sawi a. NCORD member-te chu ruihhlo dona kawngah theihtawp chhuahpuiah turin a sawm nghal a ni.

SP, Pu Shivam Siddharth chuan April ni 22 a State Level NCORD meeting-in a rel angin hma hrang hrang lak a nih tawh thu tarlangin ruihhlo do na turin 3 Years Action Plan pawh Excise & Narcotics Department leh Office dangte nen tangkawpin an duan tawh thu a tarlang a. Check Gate thar pahnih siam turin proposal duan a nih tawh thu sawiin Cherhlun leh New Ngaharchhip inkar chu drugs luhkawng (Hotspot) atan thlanchhuah a nih thu a tarlang bawk. Hei bakah hian hotspot dang pawh a tul dan azirin thlan chhuah leh tur a nih thu sawiin ruihhlo tawlhrutute chuan eng kawng pawh an zawh theih avangin border area mai ni lovin khawchhung hmun hrang hrangah te patrolling neih uluk leh zual a nih tur thu a sawi a ni.

Thutkhawmnaah hian ruihhlo dona kawnga banpui pawimawh pali - Supply reduction, Demand Reduction, Harm reduction leh Monitoring chungchangte chipchiar zawka sawi ho a ni a. Enforcement leh khawtlang ten ruihhlo don nan anmahni zawn theuhva an tih theih hrang hrangte sawi ho nghal a ni.

Thutkhawmnaah hian Addl. DC, Sr. CMO, SDO (Sadar), Addl. SP, END Asst. Commissioner, SDEO leh member dangte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit-ah District Task Force on Immunisation thukhawm
content:
1139/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 23rd of June,2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah District Task Force on Immunisation chu Pi Carolyn LB Khiangte, Addl DC hoin an thukhawm.

Pi Carolyn LB Khiangte chuan Intensified Pulse Polio Immunisation(IPPI) 1st July,2026 atanga kalpui tur chu hmalakna tha tak a ni tiin coverage tha thei ang bera neih a tul a ni a ti a. Awareness neih that a tul tiin IPPI kalpuinaah hian zirlaite hnena zirtirna tha zawk a awm theih nan zirtirtute an pawimawh hle a, booth activity kalpuinaah zirtirtute telh a tha a ni a ti bawk.

Dr Thanmawii, District Immunisation Officer chuan IPPI hnathawh dan tlangpui sawiin Mamit district a hmalak dan tur te sawi zauna a nei bawk.

title: Mamit District Aids Prevention & Control Committee thukhawm
content:
1138/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 23rd of June,2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah District Aids Prevention & Control Committee (DAPCC) chu Pi Carolyn LB Khiangte, Addl DC hoin an thukhawm.

Vawiin hunah hian Red Ribbon School Quiz Competition 2026 neih dan tur rel a ni a, school level-ah hian 24th July,2026 hmaa neih tur niin district level-ah hian 29th July,2026-ah Govt Mamit College Auditorium a neih tur a ni ang. Committee chuan school level inelna chu block tinah online a neih nise tiin titha zual top 10 chu district level-ah inelna an nei ang.He inelnaa tel thei chu pawl 8, 9 leh 11 school naupangte an ni a, quiz in a tum ber chu HIV/AIDS, STI leh RTI leh lifestyle hrisel chungchanga awareness neih that a ni.

Pi Carolyn LB Khiangte chuan Mamit district-ah HIV/ AIDS awareness kan mamawh thu sawiin NGO, Kohhran Leh khawtlang hruaitute nen theihtawpa he natna dona kawngah kan tan rual a ngai a ni a ti a. He Red Ribbon School Quiz Competition chu school naupangte tan a tangkai hle a, he topic-ah inchhiar zauna a nasat phah ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk. Addl DC chuan he inelna hi hlawhtling taka hmang tur leh theihtawp chhuah turin organiser te chu a ngen bawk.

title: MIZORAM RESOURCE MOBILIZATION COMMITTEE MEETING
content:
197/2026-2027

Aizawl, 23 June 2026:The Mizoram Resource Mobilization Committee (MRMC) met today at the Chief Minister’s Conference Hall under the chairmanship of Chief Minister Shri Lalduhoma. The meeting was attended by Vice Chairman Shri Haukhuma Hauzel, IAS (Retd.), Ministers Smt. Lalrinpuii,andShri F. Rodingliana along with other members of the Committee.

The major decisions and recommendations discussed during the meeting include:

1. Establishment of a Separate High Court for Mizoram:

The Committee discussed the need for establishing a separate High Court for Mizoram. The MRMC Sub-Committee on Administrative Reforms had already recommended the creation of a separate High Court on 27 May 2025. The Committee noted that the establishment of a separate High Court would be a significant step towards the full implementation of the provisions of the 1986 Mizoram Peace Accord. Discussions have previously been held with officials of the Law & Judicial Department. It was noted that adequate land is available for the purpose, and the move would not only reduce government expenditure in the long run but also enable the people of Mizoram to access justice more conveniently.

2. Rationalisation of Household MR and Orderly Personnel:

The Committee noted that the number of Household MRs attached to the Chief Secretary and Secretariat officers has already been reduced, resulting in substantial annual savings for the Government. The Committee further recommended reducing the number of orderly personnel currently attached to Police officers. This would help cut expenditure and ensure a more efficient deployment of police personnel.

3. Strengthening District Administration:

The Committee emphasised the need to strengthen District Administration to ensure more efficient and effective governance. It was suggested that the District Rural Development Offices (DRDOs) in each district be gradually transformed into Planning & Development Wings under the respective Deputy Commissioners’ Offices.

4. Enhancing Manpower in Deputy Commissioners’ Offices:

Recognising the manpower constraints faced by Deputy Commissioners’ Offices across districts, the Committee recommended that the MRMC Administrative Reforms Sub-Committee examine ways to strengthen staffing while keeping in mind the Government’s commitment to fiscal prudence and administrative rationalisation.

5. Review of Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA) for Doctors:

The Committee reviewed the issue of Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA) received by Government doctors and recommended the establishment of a robust monitoring system to ensure that the allowance is availed only by eligible beneficiaries in accordance with prescribed norms.

6. Implementation of the Right to Public Services Act, 2015:

The Committee stressed the need for improved monitoring and implementation of the 197 services notified under the Right to Public Services Act, 2015, so that citizens can avail themselves of these services within the stipulated timelines.

7. Other Issues Discussed:

The Committee also deliberated on ensuring that industrial plot allottees in the Zuangtui Industrial Estate utilise their plots for the intended purposes, exploring possibilities for enhancing revenue from sand and stone extraction, improving government procedures and systems, and other measures related to fiscal management and resource mobilisation.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM RESOURCE MOBILIZATION COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
1137/2026-2027

Aizawl the 23rd June 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram Resource Mobilization Committee (MRMC) chu an Chairman, Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma hovin Chief Minister’s Conference Hall-ah an thukhawm a. Pu Haukhuma Hauzel, IAS (Rtd), Vice Chairman, Ministers – Pi Lalrinpuii, Pu F. Rodingliana leh MRMC member te an tel.

An thurel langsar zualte chu:

1. Mizoramin ama puala High Court a neih theih dan tur an sawi a. MRMC Sub Committee on Administrative Reforms chuan 27th May 2025 khan a hranga High Court neih hi a lo rawt tawh a. Hei hi Mizoram Peace Accord 1986 bawhzuina a ni tel.  Law & Judicial Department hotute nen pawh sawiho a ni tawh a. High Court dinna tur hmun hma a tha a, sawrkar sum senso a lo tlem phah dawn bakah Mizoram mipuiin an dikna chanvo awlsam zawka an chan theihna tura kawng sialna a ni.

2. MRMC hian Chief Secretary leh Secretariat-a officer ten household MR an kawl zat a lo tihtlem sak tawh a. Kum tin vaibelchhe engemaw zat a hum theih phah a. Tunah hian Mizoram Police officer te’n orderly an kawl mek mi 346 hi mi 118 a tihthlak (tihtlem) tha an ti a. Sum leh pai senso a tlem phah dawn bakah Police department-a thawktute daihzai zawka semdarhna a ni nghal ang.

3. Sorkar kalphung fel leh chak zawk a awm theih nan District Administration chak zawk din a pawimawh an ti a. DC Office tihchakna atan District tina District Rural Development Office (DRDO) te hi DC Office-a Planning & Development Wing anga zawi zawia lehlin a tul nia ngaih a ni.

4. Tin, District tina Deputy Commissioner Office te manpower tihchak an ngai avangin sorkar inrenchemna hre reng chungin thuam chak dan tur MRMC, Administrative Reforms Sub-Committee-in lo ngaihtuah se, an ti bawk.

5. Mizoram sawrkar hnuaia thawk doctorten an lak mek Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA) pawh ngaihtuah nawn leh a ni a. Doctor ten NPA hi dik taka an lak theih nan ‘Monitoring System’ changtlung tak siam an rawt.

6. Mipuiten sawrkar atanga service an dawn “Right to Public Services Act, 2015” hnuaia Service 197 tarlante chu a hun taka a hmangtu mipuiten an hman theih nan tun aia tha zawka vil ni se, an ti.

7. Zuangtui Industrial Estate chhunga Industrial plot dawngtuten a nihna ang taka an hman theih dan tur te, Balu leh Lung atanga chhiah lak belh theihna te, sawrkar inrelbawl dan tha zawk neih dan tur leh sum inrenchemna lam thil eng emaw zat an sawi bawk.

Attachment

title: Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova'n Champhaiah raltlan pualin buhfai a sem; a department chan hrang hrang pisa a tlawh bawk
content:
1136/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 23rd June 2026:Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova'n vawiin khan FCI Godown, New Champhaiah raltlan te tana duan buhfai quintal 4229 leh kg 5 a sem chhuak.

Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan thu sawiin he hun buatsaihtute an buaina leh hahna avang tein lawmthu a hrilh a, mahni hun hlu tak senga lo kal khawmte chungah lawmthu a sawi bawk. Raltlan nih hi thil harsa leh hrehawm tak ni ngei tur a ni a, ei leh in mai bakah awmna tur pawh hmuh a har em em ang tih a sawi a, chung hrehawmna te chhawk zangkhai turin hetiang ruahmanna hi siam a ni tih a sawi a. Hei bakah hian raltlante chuan tanpuina dang tam tak an mamawh dawn a, Mizo leh Kristian kan nihna angin Champhai mipuite chuan tlawmngaihna leh tanpui duhna thinlung puin theih ang anga tanpuia thlamuan turin a chah a. Sawrkar thil tih hrang hrang hi mipui tello chuan a hlawhtling thei lo a, he ruahmanna pawh hi Champhaia khawtlang hruaitute leh mipuite tello chuan a hlawhtling thei lo a, thawhpuina tha tak neihpui zel turin a sawm a ni.

He hun hi Addl. DC Pu Lalbiakfela'n a kaihruai a, Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan inlawmna thu a sawi. A duh apiang tan thusawina hun hawn a ni a, District Civil Supply Officer Pu R. Lalmuankima'n lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni. Raltlan hi khaw/veng hrang hrang 43-ah mi 12,083 an awm a, mi pakhatin kg 35 zel an chang thei dawn a ni.

He hun zawh hian Minister B. Lalchhanzova chuan a department chan hrang hrang - Revenue office, Civil Supply office, Information & Public Relations office leh Legal Metrology office te a tlawh a, officer leh staff te nen inkawmna hun hmangin hma an sawn dan tur te, harsatna an sut kian dan tur leh thil dang pawimawh a sawipui a ni.

title: Sports Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar in Tuikual North Middle School-a Basketball Court hawng
content:
1135/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 23rd of June, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 2:00 khan Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Minister of State (i/c), Sports & Youth Services Department, Aizawl West-II bialtu MLA ni bawk chuan Govt. Middle School, Tuikual North-a Basketball Court sak thar a hawng.

Basketball Court hawnna puala school-a hun tawi hmannaah bialtu MLA Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan thu sawiin zirtirtute thahnemngaihna a fak a. Sawrkar sikulah chuan zirtirtu training chhuak an awm a, a bikin pawl sang lamah sawkar school-a luh kan intihhmuh a, kan inchuh nasat hle laiin a pawl hniam lamah erawh naupang an tlem, a ti a. Hei hi pawl hniam lama zirtirtute an chhiat thut vang a ni lo a, intihhmuh thil a ni, tiin, Sawrkar school-ah mi an luh duh nan theihtawp kan chhuah zel dawn a ni, Minister chuan a ti.

Sports Minister chuan sawi chhunzawmin, basketball court leh sum hman zat khaikhinin lungawithlak a tih thu a sawi a. A hman dan chungchangah pawh duat taka enkawl tur leh zirlaite dahpawimawh ber thin turin zirtirtute leh khawtlang hruaitute a chah a ni. Khawvel inthlak zelah sports hi eizawnna tlak a ni tawh a, Mizoram sawrkar pawhin Olympic 2036 thlir chungin, ‘Bana Kaih Empowering Mizoram Sports’ hnuaiah state pum huap sports coaching leh talent haichhuah a kalpui mek a ni, tiin, Minister chuan EMS hnuaia coach dil turin a chah nghal a ni.

Pu H. Lalhmingthanga, Director, Sports & Youth Services Department pawhin thu sawiin, GIA kaltlanga hna tha tak thawh a nih piahlamah documentation felfai tak siam a nih chu lawmawm a tih thu leh, Tuikual North khawtlangin hruaitu fel tak tak a nei chu vanneihthlak a tih thu a sawi a ni. Kothari Commission in a rawt angin infiamna leh taksa hriselna hi Education peng pawimawh tak, Co-Curricular Activity a ni, Director chuan a ti a. Infiamna chu taksa sawizawina a nih piahlamah thawhho zirna, kan chenhona kawnga mihringte min chhertu a ni, a ti bawk.

He huna thusawitu dang Pu C.Lalthanzira, State Project Director, Samagra Shiksha Mizoram chuan infiamna hmunhma tha chu education in a kentel pawimawh tak a ni a ti a. Basketball Court chuan naupang hriselna zirna kawngah pawh hmasawnna a thlen a beisei a, naupangte tihpui peih tur leh tang sauh saih turin zirtirtute a fuih a ni.

Tuikual North Middle School-a Basketball Court hi Sports & Youth Services Department Grant-in-Aid (2025-2026) atangin cheng nuai 15 senga a sak a ni a. Departmental work hmanga sak niin a dung feet 74 leh a vang feet 42 a ni. A thlanglamah thirlen hmanga hungna tha tak siam a ni bawk.

Vawiina Basketball Court hawnna puala hun hman hi Tuikual North Local Council Chairman Pu F Kamhmunga’n a kaihruai a, Headmistress Pi Rohlupuii’n lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni. Bialtu AMC Corporator Pi Vanlalhruaii bakah Aizawl West bialtu SDEO Pi Carolyn Rinthanpuii te, Tuikual North Local Council, MUP, MHIP aiawh te, Tuikual North M/S zirtirtu leh zirlai naupangte an tel bawk.

Attachment

title: AIZAWL DISTRICT HNUAIA RASHTRIYA GRAM SWARAJ ABHIYAN (RGSA) ATANGIN VILLAGE COUNCIL 7 HNENAH COMPUTER SET SEM
content:
1134/2026-2027

Aizawl;the 23rd June, 2026: Vawiin khan DC Pisapui Hall-ah Aizawl District Bawrhsap Er.Lalhriatpuia'n Aizawl district hnuaia Village Council pasarih (7): 1) Chhanchhuahna khawpui, 2) Darlawn vengpui, 3) Khawpuar, 4) Tinghmun, 5) Sateek, 6) Sunhluchhip , 7) Thingsat te hnenah Computer Set + Printer a sem.

Vawiin Computer Set semna inkhawm tawiah hian thu sawiin  Pu Hriatpuia  chuan Digital khawvela kan cheng tawh a, kan Village Council te pawhin khawvel changkang zel mila ke in pen ve theihna tur hmanrua pawimawh tak Computer set leh Printer in dawng hi ka lawmpui hle che u a. Hman tangkai lam mawhphurhna erawh in kutah a awm tawh a, in hman tangkai vek pawh ka beisei a ni tiin, an hman tangkai dan tur tlem tarlang a. In khua-a  ramngaw leh lui te, hmanlai thil hlu in nei te, vantlang thil neih ( social assets) te, thil chhinchhiah tlak thleng te leh in hmalakna te,  In VC huam chhunga sawrkarna hmalakna hrang hrang te; an  bul tan ni ( Date of  commencement) leh thawh zawh ni ( Date of Completion)  te, mipui hnena lehkha pawimawh pekchhuah tur te, tarchhuah tur te leh thil dang tam tak record nan in computer Set dawn hi hmang u la,  VC lo awm leh zel tur te pawhin chutianga an tih zel chuan  VC  record nei  felfai  in nih piah lamah Sawrkar hnena in mamawh hrang hrang te inthlen hunah, langtlang taka hmala thin VC in nih ziah a pholang dawn a, chu chuan thu tam tak a sawi dawn bakah,  in tan thil tih a awlsam dawn a ni. VC level a hetiang te te a hma in lo lakna hi a ni; Digital India, Vikshit Bharat @47 leh Sustainable Development Goals(SDGs) kan tih thin te  hlawhtlinna tura rahbi kan tuk tanna tur chu ni,  a ti.

Pu Ngurthansanga,DLAO,Aizawl District pawhin khuhhawnna thu sawiin, Aizawl District-ah hian VC 70 awmin,tun hmalamah Computer Set hi lo pek vek tawh thu a tarlang a.  VC te thuamchak a, tunlai thiamna mila kan VC ten ke an pen ve theihna tura thuamchak a,kawng sial sak hi RGSA thil tum lian ber a ni, a ti.

Pi Evangeline Hmingsangzuali,DPM chuan  ‘ vote of Thnaks’ sawiin vawiin programme hi a khar ta a ni.

Attachment

title: Siaha-ah LAD, MADC buatsaihin VC 71 te hnenah computer set semna hun hman a ni
content:
1133/2026-2027

Siaha the 23rd June 2026:Mara Autonomous District Council (MADC ) a Local Administration Department (LAD) buatsaihin vawiin khan MADC Golden Jubilee Hall, Siaha-ah RGSA Scheme kaltlangin District chhunga VC 71 te hnenah computer set semna hun hman a ni. MADC CEM Pu M Laikaw, District Bawrhsap Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte leh EM i/c LAD, MADC Pu K Chhuabei ten thusawina an nei.

CEM Pu M Laikaw chuan VC 71 te hnenah computer set sem theih tura duhsakna a chantir avangin RD&AD changtu Minister Prof Lalnilawma chungah lawmthu a sawi a, computer age ah computer neilo VC tam tak an awm tiin vawiina sem tak computer te chu VC leh Khawtlang tan hmasawnna ropui tak a nih ngei a beisei thu a sawi. Prime Minister in a ngaihpawimawh em em ‘Digital India’ tihhlawhtlinna pakhat a ni tiin Sawrkar Laipui leh State sawrkar chungah lawmthu a sawi bawk.

Pu M Laikaw chuan Siaha District mipuite chu ngaihtuahna thar nei tura a duh thu a sawi a, Sawrkar in hmasawnna ruhrel a duan hrang hrangte neitu thinlung pu a, duat tak leh dimdawi taka enkawl a pawimawh a ti. Vawiina sem tak computer set chu VC ten mipui rawng an bawlna kawngah an mahni tanpuitu pawimawh tak a nih a beisei tiin an kuta mawhphurhna tla chu tha taka hlen chhuak ngei turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Pu K Chhuabei, EM LAD chuan kalkhawmte chungah lawmthu sawiin  RGSA kaltlangin VC house te, tour te bakah computer set sem a ni thin a ti a, Siaha ah pawh an term chhungin VC house engemawzat sak a ni tawh tiin Central leh State Sawrkar chungah lawmthu a sawi.

LAD changtu EM chuan computer sem tak te chu hlawkthlak taka hman a nih theih nan Siaha District chhunga VC te tan computer training buatsaih a nih tur thu tarlang nghalin uluk leh ngunthluk taka chhim turin a chah nghal a. Tun tuma la dawng ve lo VC te pawhin an dawn ngei theih nan theihtawp chhuah a tum thu a sawi bawk.

Thu sawitu dang District Bawrhsap Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte chuan India in zalenna a hmuh atanga a kum za naa Ram hmasawn (Developed Country) nih a tumna, Vikshit Bharat 2047 hlawhtlinna chu grassroot level ah a innghat a, hmasawnna rualkhai leh tluantling a awm theihna turin VC te chu engkimah theihtawp chhuah tura chahin thawhhopuiah a sawm. ECI in kum 20 dana a buatsaih Special Intensive Revision chungchang pawh sawilangin official te leh kohhran, Khawtlang leh NGO te tanhona vangin enumeration form digitisation-ah Siaha District chu a zo hmasa pawl a ni a, claims and objections hunah mahni hming endik theuhin, democracy rama kan dikna chanvo humhalh a nih theih nan leh e roll dik leh felfai a awm theih nan theihtawp chhuah a tul a ti. Vawiin a sem tak computer set te chu a hmanna tur dik taka hman a nih theih nan leh Khawtlang leh District tan hmasawnna a thlen ngei theih nan duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk .

Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) hi Ministry of Panchayati Raj, Govt. of India hnuaia scheme a ni a. Mizoram-ah RD&D Department in a kalpui a ni . RGSA thiltum ber chu VC te thuam chak a, training pek a, hmasawnna ruhrel tha zawk siam sak a ni.

Pi S Lalmuanpuii, Sr LAO, MADC chuan he hun hi kaihruaiin keynote address sawina a nei a, Rev F Vanlaldika, Moderator elect chuan hunserh hmangin Pu Henry PL Hnaihly, LAO MADC in vote of thanks sawiin hun tawp a khar.

Attachment

title: DM&R Minister Prof.Lalnilawma hovin ‘Disaster risk reduction in Mizoram’ chungchang sawi ho a ni
content:
1132/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 23rd June 2026:Vawiin khan Disaster Management & Rehabililtation (DM&R) Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan ‘Disaster Risk Reduction  and Resilience Building Capacity of North East India’ initiative kalpui mek zulzuiin ‘Disaster Risk Reduction in Mizoram’ tih thupui hmangin official-te nen a pisaah sawihona hun an hmang.

DM&R Minister chuan Mizoramah ruahtui a tlak tam avangin leimin leh tuilian a nasa nasat thin a; chuvangin, mipuiten harsatna nasa zawk an pumpelh theihna turin lei laih dan te, insak dan leh lei vung paih danahte fimkhur a ngai, a ti a. Ram changkang zawkte tihdan entawna, an hmalak tawh dante zirchianna neih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu leh heng atanga Mizoramin kan zir ve theih apiang chu kalpui dan kawng zawn a tulzia a sawi bawk.

Disaster Risk Reduction and Resilience Building Capacity of North East India hi National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA), JICA, IIT-Guwahati leh North East State te thawh hona hnuaia kalpui mek a ni a. ⁠Hemi hnuaiah hian North-East State atangin Japan ramah training tura state hrang hrang official-te tirh an ni a, Mizoram aiawhin DM&R Dept Joint Director (OP) Pu.Francis Lallawmkima chu a kal a ni.

Training-ah hian khuarel chhiatna laka lo inven dan mai bakah lirnghing leh leimin/ lei tawlh kaihhnawih a lo thlen thulh pawha inrinlawk dan tur te, lirnghing leh leimin lo thlen pawha chet lak dan tur chungchang an  zir a ni.

Vawiin ⁠sawihonaah hian Pu.Francis Lallawmkima chuan Japan rama khuarel chhiatna a lo thlen thulha an lo inhmakhua dante, an hmachhawn dante leh an chet lak dan hrang hrang mai bakah Mizorama kalpui ve theih dan tur Power Point Presentation hmangin a sawifiah bawk.

He hunah hian DM&R Department Commissioner & Secretary Pu Udit Prakash Rai leh Department official hrang hrangte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Aizawl Mayor-in SVANidhi Mahotsav a Hmanpui
content:
1131/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 23rd June, 2026:Vawiin khan Dawrpui Multipurpose Centre-ah UD&PA Department buatsaih ‘SVANidhi Mahotsav’ (Khawlaia thil zuarte puala kut) chu Aizawl Mayor Pu H. Lalremtluanga'n a hmanpui.

Pu H. Lalremtluanga chuan kut hman mekah chuan hmeichhia an tam chu lawmawm a ti a, an thawhrimna, tumruhna leh tlawm duh lohna te chu chhuanawm a tih thu a sawi. Mahni sum hmang ngawta sumdawn a harsatzia sawiin, PM SVANidhi Scheme hnuaia loan hmanga sumdawnna an kalpui thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, an loan lakte an rulh that chuan an CIBIL Score a lo tha ang a, tun aia loan tha zawk dil kawngah pawh a puih theih tur thu a sawi.

Mayor chuan AMC sawkar thar hnuaiah vendor te leh vending zone zirchiang turin study team an in din thu te, vending registration pek chhuah chungchangah hmasawnna tur an ngaihtuah mek thu te, thutna hmun sawn te leh thutna hmun tur neilo te chungchangah pawh ngaihtuahna an sen mek thu te leh thutna awm sa chei that kawngah leh mipuite tana dawr nuam theih tur zawka siam kawngah hma lak zel an tum thu a sawi. Sawrkar laipuiin Solid Waste Management Rules 2026 a ti chhuak thar a, bawlhhlawh paih leh sawngbawl kawngah tun aia tha leh uluk zawka hma lak an tum thu a sawi bawk. Mayor chuan khawlaia thil zuarte chu beidawng lova rim taka thawk a, mahni awmna hmun ngai renga awm mai lova hma sawn tum zel turin a fuih a ni.

Pu Jacob Lalawmpuia, PM SVANidhi State Mission Director leh UD&PA Director ni bawk chuan kalkhawm te chu chibai a buk a, PM SVANidhi Scheme hi Covid 19 vanga khawlai a thil zuarte’n an eizawnna a harsatna an tawh phuhrukna tur a Scheme chu siam anih thusawiin, loan leh hamthatna dang an dawn theihna tur atana scheme a ni. Mizoramah PM SVANidhi beneficiaries 4459 lai awm tawh in, he Scheme hi AMC huam chhungah kalpui mek niin Lungleiah leh Mizoram hmun danga la kalpui zel tura hmachhawp an neih thu a sawi. Street vendors te economy hi kan ram economy siamtu te zinga mi a ni, a ti a, AMC sawkar thar chu UD&PA nen thawhhona tha an neih ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

He kutah hian PM SVANidhi credit card semna hun neih a ni a, loan vawi hnihna thleng rul zo tawhte tan dil theih a ni a, mi 42 te’n dil tawhin vawiin hian Pi Saitluangi hnenah hlan a ni. He kutah vek hian PM SVANidhi scheme kal tlanga loan rul tha leh digital payment ti tam zual pali (4) te hnenah lawmman certificate leh sum fai hlan an ni. A dawngtute chu:

1. Pi Hunlawmawmi2. Pi Chawngthanpari3. ⁠Pi R.Lalawmpuii4. ⁠Pu Biakliana5. ⁠Pu Vanlalhriatzuala Sailo

He kutah hian AMC Executive Councillor pahnih Pu Vanlalhruaia leh Pu Vanlalfaka te leh he scheme hnuaia bank lama an thawhpui te pawh an tel a. Pi C. Lalduhzuali, PM-SVANidhi Project Director leh UD&PA Joint Director ni bawk chuan report a pe a, Pi R. Lalhmangaihzuali, Superintendent chuan lawmthu sawinain session hmasa zawk hi a khar a, session pahnihnaah hian loan la tute leh bank lam te nen sawihona leh PM SVANidhi credit card chungchang leh cyber awareness lam inzirtirna hun hman a ni.

PM-SVANidhi Scheme chungchang tawi :

PM-SVANidhi Scheme hi Street Vendors ten an eizawnnaa hmasawnna an neih theihna tura scheme duan niin, Kum 2020, June ni 1 ah sawrkar laipuiin a tlangzarh a, Ministry of Housing & Urban Affairs leh Ministry of Department of Financial Services te chu Nodal niin, Mizoram ah chuan UD&PA Dept chu Nodal Department a ni.

He scheme hian a tum ber chu Street Vendor ten an eizawnna pui tura Loan awlsam zawka an lak theihna tur leh, pung tlem zawka an rulh theihna tur te, him zawk a an sumdawnna an kal pui theihna tur a phone hmanga sum dawn leh pekchhuah thiam tir a hman tir hi a tum pakhat a ni. Loan la tu zawng zawng te, anmahni bakah an chhungte Social Security scheme hrang hrang chhawr tangkai tir a tum bawk a ni.

He scheme hnuaiah hian Loan lak theih hi Rs. 90,000/- thleng niin, Loan hi Instalment ang in hetiang hian pek tur a ni:-

1st Loan - Rs. 15,000 ( thla 12 chhunga rulh zawh tur)

2nd Loan - Rs. 25,000 ( thla 18 chhunga rulh zawh tur)

3rd Loan - Rs. 50,000 (kum 3 chhunga rulh zawh tur)

Loan hi a pung atanga 7% sawrkarin a rulh pui tur a ni a, maherawhchu rul tha lo te chu rulh pui theih an ni dawnlo a ni.PM SVANidhi scheme hnuaia Loan pek chhuah dan:-

Mizoram1st Loan - 2,914 beneficiaries (Rs. 3.05cr)2nd Loan - 1,172 beneficiaries (Rs.2.51 cr)3rd Loan - 373 beneficiaries ( Rs.1.87cr)

Aizawl1st Loan - 2,108 beneficiaries (Rs. 2.22 cr)2nd Loan - 951 beneficiaries (Rs.2.03 cr)3rd Loan - 326 beneficiaries ( Rs.1.63cr)

He scheme hnuaiah hian Loan application hi online (portal kaltlangin) upload tur a ni a, District hrang hrangah UD&PA Department lamin Application upload in, Lending Institution hrang hrang ten loan hi an pe chhuak a ni.

Aizawl bikah hian Scheme kal pui tan tirh atangin UD&PA leh AMC ten Street Vendors Loan la tur leh la tawh te hi buaipuiin, Camp pawh vawi 65 buatsaih a ni tawh a, loan la tawh te hi Ministry in a phut angin Vendor ID card (mobile vendor) leh Certificate of Vending(CoV) te siam sak thin niin, heng ID Card leh CoV te hi Aizawl bikah chuan AMC atanga pek chhuah a ni.

He scheme hnuai Loan la tute chu anmahni leh an chhungteah Socio Economic Profiling neih niin, Social Security Scheme hrang hrang heng- PM Suraksha Bima Yojana, PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana, PM Shram Yogi Maandhan Yojana, PM Jan Dhan Yojana, One Nation One Ration Card, Registration under BoCW, Janani Suraksha Yojana, PM Matru Vandana Yojana te hi an chhawr tangkai theihna tura puih an ni.

PM-SVAnidhi Scheme leh a scheme hnuaia beneficiaries te hi sawrkar laipuiin Prime Minister Office (PMO) atangin a en zui (monitor) a, Scheme hnuaia beneficiaries te tan hian Exposure Program te neih thin a ni a,heng hunah te hian SVANidhi beneficiaries te hi hruai thin an ni. PM-SVANidhi Scheme kum thum tlin lawmna, June ni 1, 2023 a Delhi-a neih tumin SVANidhi beneficiaries te hruai an lo ni tawh a, kum 2024 leh 2026-ah te Republic Day lawmna pui ber Delhi-a neihah beneficiaries leh an kawppui te hruai tawh niin, tun thla ni 1 ah khan Scheme kum 6 tlin lawmna North East State te puala neihna hmun, Agartala ah Beneficiaries te hruai an ni leh bawk ani.

title: Social Welfare Minister-in Kum Upa Leh Rualbanlote Pual Free Distribution Camp hmanpui
content:
1130/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 23 June 2026:Vawiin khan Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department changtu Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan State Commissioner for Persons with Disability Office Chaltlangah, Artificial Limb Manufacturing Company (ALIMCO) leh Mizoram State Commissioner for Persons with Disability (PWD) tangkawp buatsaih, kum upa leh mahnia chet sawn kawnga Rualbanlote hnena an hmanraw mamawh (Aids and Appliances)-te semna hun chu khuallian niin a hmanpui.

He hunah hian khuallian, Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department changtu Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan thusawiin, PWD Commissioner Office leh ALIMCO-te hmalakna chu ropui a tih thu a sawi a. A bik takin PWD Commissioner Office chu thawktu tlem te leh hmun zau ber a ni lo chunga Mizorama rualbanlote tana a hnathawhte chu fakawm a tih thu tarlangin, Mizorama RPWD Act 2016-in Rualbanlote hamthatna hrang hrang a tarlan, a taka ken kawh kawngahte, mipui vantlanga inzirtirna kalpui leh Rualbanlote a taka an chhawmdawlna zawng zawngahte Commissioner Office chu chhuanawm a tih thu a sawi a. Commissioner hmalaknate nena inmil tak mai ALIMCO lamin an lo kalpui chu lawmawm a tih thusawiin, ALIMCO-in mi harsa zawkte thleng phaka mamawhtute hnena hmanraw changkang tak tak a thlawn liau liau va an sem thei chu thil ropui tak a ni a ti a. Commissioner for Persons with Disability, Mizoram leh ALIMCO-te chu Mizoram tana hna ropui tak an thawhna kawnga an kal zelna turah duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk a ni.

Artificial Limb manufacturing Company (ALIMCO) hi Kanpur khawpuia hmunpui nei, Sawrkar laipui hriatpuia din pawl changtlung tak, India ram hmun hrang hrang a Rualbanlohna chi hrang hrang neite mamawh bungrua leh hmanraw pawimawh tak tak siam chhuak thin a ni a. ALIMCO chuan heng an hmanraw siam chhuahte hi a mamawhtute hnenah man lovin an sem chhuak leh thin a ni.

Vawiina Free Distribution Camp puala hun hmanah hian ALIMCO aiawhin Pu Dipti Ramjan Mohanti te, Pu F. Zorinsanga leh Pu Joseph Lalmuanpuiate, PWD Commissioner Office-a thawktute leh MUP member sawm bikte bakah hmanraw sem dawngtu turte an tel kim hle a. Hun hman hi Mizoram State Commissioner for PWD, Pi Vanlaldiki Sailo chuan kaihruaiin kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Hmanruate sem zawh a nih hnuin, Pi Lalruatkimi Vanchhawng, Asst. Commissioner, PWD chuan lawmthu sawiin hun hman hi a titawp a ni.

Attachment

title: Govt. Aizawl College Building inhlanna thuthlung H&TE Department leh Mizoram Presbyterian Church ten an ziak
content:
1129/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, 23rd June, 2026:Vawiin khan Planning & Programme Implementation (P&PI) Department Committee Room-ah Higher & Technical Education Department leh Mizoram Presbyterian Church (Synod) te chuan Govt. Aizawl College (GAC) Building, Sikulpuikawn inhlanna thuthlung "Deed of Agreement" an ziak fel.

H&TE Minister Dr. Vanlalthlana chuan vawiina inremsiamna thuthlung ziah a ni thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, GAC building hman zui zelna turah zirna atana hmasawnna tha zawk a nih theih a beisei thu a sawi. He hmalakna atana tha leh zung sengtute: Drafting Committee te mai bakah H&TE Department, Mizoram Presbyterian Church hruaitute, GAD, MPWD, Law & Judicial leh Finance Department-a thawktute zawng zawng chungah lawmthu sawiin duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

He building inhlanna lehkhaah hian Mizoram sawrkar aiawhin H&TE Commissioner & Secretary Dr. Lalrozama chuan hming ziakin, Mizoram Synod aiawhin Synod Moderator Rev. John Raldosanga chuan hming a ziak bawk. Inremna hriatpuitu atan Mizoram sawrkar aiawhin H&TE Joint Secretary Pu K. Lalhmangaihzuala leh H&TE Director Pu Laltanpuia chuan hming an ziah bakah Mizoram Synod aiawhin Synod Secretary Rev. B. Zohmangaiha leh Sr. Executive Secretary Rev. VL Luaia Hranleh chuan hming an ziak bawk a ni.

He hun hi Higher & Technical Education Department, Commissioner & Secretary Dr. Lalrozama chuan kaihruaiin, H&TE Director Pu Laltanpuia chuan report a pe bawk.

Mizoram Sawrkar leh Mizoram Presbyterian Kohhran inremna angin kum 2019 khan Sikulpuikawna Govt. Boys Primary School leh Govt. Boys Middle School chu school building leh a ram nen Mizoram Presbyterian Kohhran kuta hlan a lo ni tawh a. Govt. Aizawl College building dinna ram (land) chu inhlan chhawn hian huam telin Mualpui, Salema an college campus thara an insawn fel chhungin inbiak remna anga luah chhunzawm tel zel a ni.

Govt. Aizawl College building chungchangah hian Mizoram Sawrkar leh Presbyterian Kohhran chu lo indawr tawh ṭhinin January ni 8, 2025 khan Higher & Technical Education Minister Dr Vanlalthlana pisa-ah inhlan fel dan tur ngaihtuahin ṭhut ho a ni a. Building hlutna hi Mizoram PWD chuan chhut felin hemi hmang hian inremna ziah a ni a, Higher & Technical Education Department kut aṭangin Mizoram Presbyterian Kohhran chuan building hi a la fel ta a ni.

Inremnaah hian Mizoram Synod chuan building hlut zawng (depreciated value), sawrkar dan ding lai anga chhut chhuah sa Rs.3,18,92,300/- chu Mizoram sawrkar (H&TE Department) ah chhung lutin, pawisa a chhun luh ni atang hian Government Aizawl College Building, Sikulpuikawn ami neitu nihna chu Mizoram Presbyterian Church kutah a awm nghal dawn a ni. Hei bakah hian hemi Building luah tute awm zui zel dan tur chungchang pawh felfai takin inremna lehkha ah hian ziah a ni bawk.

Kumin January ni 7 khan H&TE Minister Dr. Vanlalthlana kaihhruaina hnuaiah building inhlan chungchang hi ngaihtuah ho tawh a ni a. Draft Agreement buatsaihtu tur Drafting Committee din niin, Draft agreement (final draft) hi March ni 23, 2026 khan peih fel a ni. Law Department leh Finance Department aṭangin pawmpuina lak a nih hnuah vawiin hian hming ziah hnan a ni ta a ni.

He hunah hian H&TE Under Secretary Pu Zahmingthanga, Synod Executive Secretary Rev. Dr. Rosiamliana Tochhawng leh Govt. Aizawl College Principal Pu Lalbiakzuala te an tel bawk a. He hun hi H&TE Department Joint Secretary Pu K. Lalhmangaihzuala chuan lawmthu sawiin a khar a ni.

title: “CAREER HANDBOOKS CONSISTING OF 500 CAREERS” LEH “MY CAREER ADVISOR’ APP” CHUNGCHANG INZIRTIRNA DISTRICT LEVEL WORKSHOP SERCHHIPAH NEIH A NI
content:
1128/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 23rdJune 2026:Serchhip District chhunga zirlaite hnena career kaihhnawih hriatna leh hmalakna tha zawk pek tumin, “Career Handbooks consisting of 500 Careers” leh “My Career Advisor’ App” chungchang zirchianna Workshop chu June 23, 2026 (Thawhlehni) zing dar 9:00 khan Government Serchhip Higher Secondary School-ah neih a ni. He programme hi Samagra Shiksha, Serchhip District, Institution’s Innovation Council, Government Zirtiri Residential Science College leh ZoCareer Solutions, Aizawl te tang hoa buatsaih a ni.

He programme hi Pu JR. Lalhruaitluanga, District Education Officer & District Project Coordinator, Samagra Shiksha, Serchhip-in a kaihruai a. Workshop-ah hian career thlan dan leh zirna kawng hrang hrang chungchang sawi ho a ni a, zirlaite hnenah an hmalakna tur kawngah kaihhruaina pawimawh tak pek a ni.

Chawhma session-ah Science Stream zirlaite tan programme buatsaih a ni a. Resource Person Dr. Lalhruaitluanga, Founder, ZoCareer Solutions & Assistant Professor & Chairman, Institution's Innovation Council, GZRSC chuan thupui hrang hrang sawiin zirlaite hnenah career remchang leh hmalam hunah hna leh zirna kawng hrang hrang awm dan a hrilhfiah a ni.

Science Stream session-ah hian Class XI zirlai 41 leh Class XII zirlai 52 an tel a, an vaiin zirlai 93 an ni.

Chawhnu lam session-ah Arts Stream zirlaite tan programme neih a ni bawk a. He session hi Dr. Lalrinmawia, Associate Professor & Chairman, Information & Communication Technology, GZRSC-in kaihruaiin Arts Stream zirlaite tan career remchang hrang hrang, higher education leh digital technology hmanga career planning dante a sawi a ni.

Arts Stream session-ah hian Class XI zirlai  leh Class XII zirlai  an tel.

Workshop-ah hian “Career Handbooks consisting of 500 Careers” leh “My Career Advisor’ App” hmanga career hriatna zau zawk neih dan, zirna kawng hrang hrang thlan dan leh hna remchang hrang hrangte zirlaite hnenah hrilhfiah a ni a. He programme hi zirlaite hmalam hun atan career planning tha leh thutlukna dik siam theih nana hmalakna pawimawh tak a ni.

Attachment

title: Minister Lalnghinglova Hmar Attends Seminar on Emerging Trends and New Challenges Faced by Mizoram
content:
196/2026-2027

Aizawl, 23 June 2026:As part of the observance of theInternational Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking, observed annually on 26 June, a seminar on the theme“Emerging Trends and New Challenges Faced by Mizoram”was held today at Lianchhiari Conference Hall, I&PR Department. Excise & Narcotics Minister Shri. Lalnghinglova Hmar attended the programme as the chief guest.

The seminar was jointly organized by the Social Welfare Department, Women & Child Development Department, DC Aizawl Office, Health & Family Welfare Department, Mizoram Police, Excise & Narcotics Department, DIPR, Higher & Technical Education Department, IG Prison, School Education Department, 23 Sector Assam Rifles, BSF, MRH&CD, MSACS, CYMA, MKHC, MDUF, FINGODAP and SLCA NE-III.

In his address, Shri. Lalnghinglova Hmar stated that the Government of Mizoram and various organizations have been making sustained efforts to combat drug abuse and trafficking. While stressing the need for stronger and more coordinated action, he noted that Mizoram’s relatively small size and population present an opportunity for more effective collective action. He expressed confidence that if all sections of society work together, the state can make significant progress in addressing the drug menace and safeguarding its future generations.

Delivering the welcome address, Shri. Sushil Singh, Director, Social Welfare Department, said that the seminar was organized as part of the observance of the International Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking. He noted that Mizoram’s geographical location along international borders and its proximity to the Golden Triangle make it particularly vulnerable to drug trafficking and substance abuse. He emphasized that the issue must be addressed through a comprehensive approach encompassing prevention, treatment, rehabilitation, awareness generation and community participation, while calling for greater collaboration among government agencies, civil society organizations, churches and citizens.

Speaking on the occasion, Shri. C. Lalruaia, Secretary, Excise & Narcotics Department, highlighted the need for Mizoram to continuously develop new strategies and adapt to emerging trends in drug abuse by utilizing advanced knowledge, expertise and innovative approaches.

The seminar featured presentations by experts on various aspects of drug abuse and rehabilitation. Shri. Peter Zohmingthanga, Joint Commissioner, Excise & Narcotics Department, delivered a presentation on“Emerging Trends in Drug Abuse: Perspectives on Supply Reduction.”Dr. R.L. Sanghluna, Director, Synod Hospital, spoke on“Medical Aspects of Addiction and the Current Challenges in Care and Treatment.”Smt. Vanlalhruaii, MSD & RB, Directorate of Social Welfare, presented“Drug Demand Reduction: Strategies for Addressing Emerging Challenges,”while Shri. Lalremruata, President, Mizoram Drug Users Forum (MDUF), spoke on“Community Perspective on Emerging Trends and Challenges.”

The programme was chaired by Shri. Lalramdinsanga. Following the presentations, an interactive discussion and question-and-answer session was held, providing participants with an opportunity to exchange ideas, share experiences and explore collaborative approaches to addressing the challenges posed by drug abuse and illicit trafficking.

Attachment

title: Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar hovin "Emerging Trends and New Challenges Faced by Mizoram" tih thupui hmangin seminar neih a ni
content:
1127/2026-2027

Aizawl, 23 June 2026:Vawiin khan Lianchhiari Conference Hall, I&PR Department-ah "Emerging Trends and New Challenges Faced by Mizoram" tih thupui hmangin seminar neih a ni a, Excise and Narcotics Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan khuallian niin hun a hmanpui. Seminar hi Social Welfare Department, Women and Child Development Department, DC Aizawl, Health and Family Welfare Department, Mizoram Police, Excise and Narcotics Department, DIPR, Higher and Technical Education Department, IG Prison, School Education Department, 23 Sector Assam Rifles, BSF, MRH&CD, MSACs,  CYMA, MKHC, MDUF, FINGODAP, SLCA NE III- te ṭangkawpa buatsaih a ni.

Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar khuallian ni bawkchuan thusawiin Mizoram sawrkar leh Pawl hrang hrangten nasa takin ruihhlo do chungchangah hma an la a, chutihrualin tun aia nasa lehzual a ṭan lak angaih thu a sawi. Mizoram chu ram zim te anih bakah mihring cheng pawh kan tam loh avangin kan ṭanrual phawt chuan ruihhlo dona kawngah beisei tur a awm a ni, a ti.

Pu Sushil Singh, Director, Social Welfare department chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu sawiin, Seminar hi ‘International Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit trafficking’ puala buatsaih anih thu a sawi a. Mizoramah Sorkar, Kohhran leh khawtlang thawhhona a ṭhat avanga lawmawm a tih thu sawiin Damdawi hmansualna hi harsatna lian tak a ni a, inzirtirna (awareness) kawngah pawh nasa taka hmalak a ṭul thu a sawi bawk.

Pu C.Lalruaia, Secretary, Excise& Narcotics Department pawhin thusawiin, Mizoramin ruihhlo do kawnga kan mamawh leh kalphungthar tur duan lawk a, thiamna sang zawkte hmang tangkaia  inher rem zel a pawimawh thu a sawi a ni.

Seminar-ah hian thiamna nei hrang hrangten thupui pawimawh tak tak hmangin presentation an nei a; Pu Peter Zohmingthanga, Jt. Commissioner, Excise & Narcotics Department-in ‘Emerging Trends in Drug Abuse: Perspectives on Supply Reduction’ tih thupui a sawi a, Dr. RL. Sanghluna, Director, Synod Hospital-in ‘Medical aspects of addiction and the current challenges in care & treatment’ a sawi a, Pi Vanlalhruaii , MSD & RB, Directorate of Social Welfare-in ‘ Drug Demand Reduction: Strategies for Addresing Emerging Challenges’ tih thupui a sawi bakah Pu Lalremruata, President, Mizoram Drug Users Forum( MDUF) pawhin ‘Community perspective on emerging trends and challenges’ tih thupui a sawi bawk a ni.

He hun hi Pu Lalramdinsanga’n a kaihhruaia, Presentation neih zawhah hian sawihona leh zawhna leh chhanna hun hman chhunzawm nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: Hnahthial District Task Force on Immunization thukhawmin Sub National Immunization Day hman dan tur rel
content:
1126/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 23rd June, 2026:Vawiin khan District Task Force on Immunization (DTFI) chu an Chairman leh Hnahthial Bawrhsap ni bawk, Pi K. Vanlalruati kaihhruaiin DC meeting Hall, Hnahthialah thukhawmna neih a ni a. Kumin atana Sub National Immunization Day (SNID) chu nikum lama hman tawhna, Health & Wellness Centre, Electric Vengah hman leh ni se ti a rel a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan Sub National Immunization Day hman a ni leh tur chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin thawktute pawh naupangten an vaccine lak tur ang te an lak ngei theih nan theihtawp chhuah zel turin a fuih a. Kumin chu Hnahthial District bila vawi khat SNID hmanna tur a nih dawn avangin District ang pawhin a hlut lehzual tur thu a sawi bawk.

Sr. CMO leh Member Secretary ni bawk, Dr. Lalnunziri chuan SNID ah hian polio vaccine chiah pek tur a nih thu sawiin naupang kum 5 chin hnuai lam hnenah pek tur a nih thu a sawi a. Kum 2014-ah polio hi India ramah um bo ni tawh mah se kan thenawm ramah a la hluar avangin kum tin hian inven nan vaccine hi pek reng a nih thu a sawi a ni.

Kumin Sub National Immunization Day hi July ni 1 ah Health & Wellness Centre, Electric Vengah neih tur a ni dawn a. Dar 11:30 am ah neih tur niin Bawrhsap leh DTFI Chairman chu khuallian a ni ang a. SNID ah hian Vaccine hi Booth 40-ah pek tur niin vaccine hi target beneficiaries ( naupang kum 5 chin hnuaiah) 2315 hnenah pek tura ruahmanna siam a ni.

Thutkhawmnaah hian CDPO, DIPRO leh DEO office dang aiawh bakah member hrang hrangte an tel a ni.

title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT TASK FORCE COMMITTEE ON IMMUNIZATION THUKHAWM
content:
1125/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 23rdJune 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District chhunga hri danna (vaccine) lak dan tur chungchang ngaihtuahin District Task Force Committee on Immunization chu Serchhip DC Meeting Hall-ah an thukhawm a, Additional Deputy Commissioner  Pi Dorothy Muansangi’n he thutkhawmna hi a kaihruai ni.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian tunlaia Pakistan leh a chhehvela hri leng mek Zeng hri (Polio) laka lo invenna tura July 1 -3, 2026 chhunga vaccination/immunization kalpui dan tur te, Chhul hmawr Cancer venna HPV Vaccine chungchang te, Routine Immunization leh Serchhip Distirct dinhmun hrang hrangte thlirletna leh tunhnaia Mizoram thenawm Bangladesh rama Sentut/Sentet (measles/Rubela) hri leng mek chungchang leh invenna (vaccine) lak a pawimawhzia te, mipuite him nan uar leh zuala hri danna lak a nih theih nana thawh hona tha lehzual a awm theih dan turte sawi ho a ni.

Chief Medical Officer Dr. Lallawmpuii chuan tunlaiin India thenawm ram Pakistan leh a chhehvelahte Polio hri a len nasat thu sawiin, he hri hi India ramah um bo lo ni tawh mah se, darh leh thei a nih avang leh he hri laka kan fihlim (free) reng theih nan  Universal Immunization Programme (UIP) hnuaiah July 1 - 3, 2026 chhungin Serchhip district hmun hrang hrangah ngawrh taka Vaccine lakna beihpui kalpui tur a nih thu a sawi a. India ramah chhul hmawl cancer a hluar thu sawiin HPV Vaccine lak pawimawhzia leh chhul hmawr cancer avang hian India ramah minute khat tlinglo chhunga mi pakhat an thih ziah thu a sawi bawk. Private Hospitalah HPV Vaccine lak nan cheng sang thum atanga singkhat bawr velte insen ngai thin chu UIP programme hnuaiah naupang kum 14 pum tawh, 15 la tling lote tan a thlawna lak theih a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Deputy Chief Medical Officer Dr. Lallawmkimi Chhakchhuak-in  Polio Vaccine inpek dan tur, Intensified Pulse Polio Immunization (IPPI) Serchhip district-a kalpui dan tur hrang hrangte sawiin, July ni 1-ah hmun hrang hrangah Vaccine pekna tur hmun siam tur niin chung hmun ruatahte chuan nausen (0-59 months) te chu an chhungte’n hruaiin Oral Polio Vaccine eitir tur an nih thu a sawi a. July ni 2 – 3 chhungin in tin tlawh kualin Polio Vaccine pek beihpui thlakna neih tur a nih thu a sawi bawk. Heng bakah hian tunlaia Bangladesh-a Sentut hri leng mek avanga  mipuite fimkhur a ngaih thu sawiin Routine Immunization ngaih pawimawh a tul thu leh Serchhip district dinhmunte a tarlang bawk.

Additional DC Pi Dorothy Muansangi chuan heng hri danna (vaccine) pawimawh tak takte hi a latu turte’n tha taka an lak a, mi tumah pek hmaih an nih lohna turin, sawrkar department-te leh khawtlang hruaitu leh mipui zawng zawngte tanrual a pawimawh thu sawiin, thawhhona tha tak nei turin Serchhip district mipuite a sawm a ni.

Attachment

title: SINGLE-USE PLASTICS (SUPS) CHUNGCHANGA DEPUTY COMMISSIONER, KHAWZAWL DISTRICT THUCHHUAH.
content:
1124/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, 23rd June, 2026 :Deputy Commissioner, Khawzawl District chuan Khawzawl District chhunga Ecological Balance, Thianghlimna, leh Natural Beauty humhalhna tur atan Tourist Spot-ah Single-Use Plastics (SUPS), Solid Waste Management (SWM) Rules, 2026 in thuneihna a pek angin hman khapna, a hnuaia mi ang hian  thupek a chhuah

title: INTERNATIONAL OLYMPIC DAY 2026 LAMMUAL AH HMAN A NI
content:
1123/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 23rd June 2026 :International Olympic Day 2026 pualin Mizoram Olympic Association chuan Olympic Day Run leh Plantation Drive a buatsaih a. Infiammi 631 ten Chanmari kawn, Dinthar leh Sikulpuikawn atangin Lammual an pan a, Environment Forest & Climate Change Minister Pu Lalthansanga’n khuallian niin hun a hmanpui.

Minister Pu Lalthansanga chuan thu sawiin, Olympic Day puala thingphun ngaih pawimawh a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, environment thatna state chu state hausa an nih thu sawiin, kalkhawmte chu thingphun leh ramngaw humhalh ngai pawimawh deuh deuh turin a chah nghal bawk a ni. Infiammi kal khawmte hnenah chuan inzahtawnna te, hun vawn dik te, mahni inthunnunna te leh dawhtheihna te ngaih pawimawh a tul thu sawiin, infiamna chu huatna ni lo a in unauna tha zawk infiammite inkara thlen thei tu ni ngei se a duh thu a sawi bawk.

Khual zahawm Sports and Youth Services Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar pawhin thu sawiin, Olympic Day puala Olympic Day run hman a ni thin chu tha a tih thu sawiin, Mizoram chu a hminga Olympic Day lo zawm ve tu mai ni lo a, Olympic ah ngei Mizo infiammi tam zawk kan la tel ve ngei a beisei tlat thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Olympic Day Run ah hian Infiamna pawl chi hrang hrang 15 chuang atangin mi 631 an inlan a, pawl tlan tam te hnenah lawmman sem a ni a, Mizoram Table Tennis Association chu pakhatna niin cheng 10,000 hlan an ni a, Mizoram Football Association leh Mizoram Wrestling Association ten lawmman pahnihna cheng 5000 an la a, Hockey Mizoram leh Mizoram Amateur Taekwondo Association ten lawmman pathumna cheng 4000 an la bawk a ni. Lawmman pawisa fai an sem rual hian thing tiak hlan tel nghal zel an ni bawk.

Olympic Day lawmna hi Mizoram Olympic Association President Pu Robert Romawia Royte chuan kaihruaiin, MOA Secretary General, Pu V Lalzawmliana hnen atangin report ngaihthlak a ni a, MOA Senior Vice President Pu F Lalnienga’n lawmthu sawina in hun a khar a. Lammual a hun hman zawh hian, Muallungthu a Mizoram State Sports Council Ground-ah thing tiak phunna hun hman chhunzawm nghal a ni.

Attachment
